body: Prior to this commit, `flux_dn_dir` was not set in the two stream case for non-gray radiation, leading to incorrect values (whatever was in the memory at init). Now, the variable is accumulated over for ever g-point.
title: Fix flux_dn_dir not updated in all sky two stream
